Vijay's debut in Tamil Nadu, the BJP's gains in West Bengal and Kerala's return to rotation mark significant shifts. title: Microsoft CEO makes a promise to Windows users: We will win back fans
description: Microsoft is doubling down on improving its consumer products, including Windows and Xbox, to boost user engagement. CEO Satya Nadella highlighted efforts to enhance quality, address core user needs, and win back fans.

title: Commanders, Raiders Eye Former Cowboys CB Trevon Diggs in Free Agency Rumors
description: The Washington Commanders and the Las Vegas Raiders are exploring a move for Trevon Diggs as teams reassess needs after the NFL Draft. The former Dallas Cowboys All-Pro remains a free agent following an inconsistent 2025 season. With strong ties to Dan Quinn, Washington could offer the right system for a comeback. Meanwhile, the Raiders need depth in the secondary. Diggs’ ball-hawking ability still stands out despite injuries and recent struggles, making him a low-risk option with upside as training camp approaches
